candidate_definition_hints.text: ゆき酱是使用 ZeroBot 构建的国际象棋聊天机器人。

FROM golang:1.23 AS builder WORKDIR /app COPY . . RUN make build FROM ubuntu:24.04 WORKDIR /app COPY --from=builder /app/bin/yukichan-bot-linux-amd64-v1.0.0 /app/yukichanbot RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates \ git python-is-python3 python3-pip inkscape RUN…
